name: labscriptai-ot
description: Single-package LabscriptAI Opentrons plugin with MCP, skills, safety policy, and curated protocols.

interface.shortDescription: Opentrons simulation-first authoring and safe MCP runtime
interface.longDescription: LabscriptAI OT bundles seven Opentrons skills, a local MCP server, safety policy, and a small curated protocol library. Live robot actions stay opt-in and simulation remains the gate before unattended execution.
defaultPrompt: Help me design a Flex liquid-handling experiment from scratch — review intent first, then write and simulate the protocol
Check whether this Opentrons protocol can pass local simulation safely
What state is the robot in? Run safety checks before any recovery action
interface.postInstallMessage: LabscriptAI OT installed. Run node scripts/verify-setup.mjs from the plugin root, then read docs/GETTING_STARTED.md for platform setup and your first command.
